qa.question: What instrument does Alice practice every morning?

session_1.speaker: Alice
session_1.text: Hi Bob, I am Alice. I live in Hangzhou and work as a data scientist, and I want you to remember my morning wellness routine.

session_1.speaker: Bob
session_1.text: Sure, Alice. Tell me about your morning wellness routine.

session_1.speaker: Alice
session_1.text: I practice violin every morning before work because it helps me stay calm and focused.

session_1.speaker: Bob
session_1.text: I will remember that violin practice is part of your morning routine.

session_1.speaker: Alice
session_1.text: After violin practice, I drink green tea and write a short health journal.

session_1.speaker: Bob
session_1.text: So your routine includes violin, green tea, and a short health journal.

session_1.speaker: Alice
session_1.text: Please remember that I am allergic to peanuts, so my breakfast must avoid peanut snacks.

session_1.speaker: Bob
session_1.text: Understood. I will remember that your morning routine and breakfast should avoid peanuts.

session_2.speaker: Alice
session_2.text: Good morning Bob, I followed the same morning wellness routine again today.

session_2.speaker: Bob
session_2.text: Good morning Alice. Did you practice violin again?

session_2.speaker: Alice
session_2.text: Yes, I practiced violin for twenty minutes before work, then drank green tea and wrote in my health journal.

session_2.speaker: Bob
session_2.text: That matches your routine: violin first, then green tea and health journaling.

session_2.speaker: Alice
session_2.text: This routine is important because it reduces my stress before data science work.

session_2.speaker: Bob
session_2.text: I will remember that the routine helps reduce your stress before work.

session_2.speaker: Alice
session_2.text: My goal this year is to build a mental health chatbot that remembers routines, allergies, and user preferences.

session_2.speaker: Bob
session_2.text: That goal fits your interest in memory assistants, health routines, and preference tracking.

session_2.speaker: Alice
session_2.text: Please keep this as a stable preference: concise reminders about my violin routine, green tea, journal, and peanut allergy are best.

session_2.speaker: Bob
session_2.text: Got it. I will keep reminders concise and remember your violin routine, green tea, journal, and peanut allergy.

session_2.speaker: Alice
session_2.text: If I ask about breakfast or morning planning later, remind me to avoid peanuts and keep the routine short.

session_2.speaker: Bob
session_2.text: I will remember to suggest peanut-free breakfast ideas and short morning plans.
